items.title: Customer Management
items.description: Manage customer profiles, IPs, PPPoE accounts, and network devices with ease.

items.title: Subscription & Billing
items.description: Auto recurring invoices, suspend unpaid accounts, and track payments seamlessly.

items.title: Network Provisioning
items.description: Integrate with Mikrotik, PPPoE servers, and OLTs for automatic user provisioning.

items.title: Monitoring & Analytics
items.description: Track uptime, bandwidth usage, ping latency, and generate traffic reports.

items.title: Technician & Installation
items.description: Schedule installations, assign technicians, manage tickets, and monitor field work.

items.title: Voucher & Hotspot
items.description: Generate temporary vouchers with bandwidth and time limits for RT/RW networks or hotspots.
